ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hosts" (
  "host_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each host */,
  "host_response_rate" TEXT /* Percentage of host responses to inquiries */,
  "host_acceptance_rate" TEXT /* Percentage of booking requests accepted by the host */,
  "host_is_superhost" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the host is a superhost */,
  "host_listings_count" INTEGER /* Count of active listings by the host */,
  "host_total_listings_count" INTEGER /* Total count of all listings by the host */,
  "host_verifications" TEXT /* Methods used for host verifications */,
  "host_has_profile_pic" INTEGER /* Indicates if the host has a profile picture */,
  "host_identity_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the host's identity is verified */,
  "host_since" TEXT /* Date when the host joined the platform */,
  "host_location" TEXT /* Location of the host */,
  "host_about" TEXT /* Description about the host */,
  "host_response_time" TEXT /* Average response time */,
  "host_license" TEXT /* Required license information */,
  "host_language" TEXT /* Languages spoken by the host */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("host_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "listings" (
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listing */,
  "host_id" INTEGER /* ID of the host managing the listing */,
  "room_type" TEXT /* Type of room (e.g., entire home/apt, private room) */,
  "accommodates" INTEGER /* Number of guests the room accommodates */,
  "bathrooms" REAL /* Number of bathrooms available */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms available */,
  "beds" INTEGER /* Number of beds available */,
  "bed_type" TEXT /* Type of bed (e.g., Real Bed, Sofa Bed) */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price per night */,
  "security_deposit" TEXT /* Security deposit amount */,
  "cleaning_fee" TEXT /* Cleaning fee for the listing */,
  "guests_included" INTEGER /* Number of guests included in the basic price */,
  "extra_people" TEXT /* Extra charge for additional guests */,
  "minimum_nights" INTEGER /* Minimum number of nights for a booking */,
  "maximum_nights" INTEGER /* Maximum number of nights for a booking */,
  "listing_title" TEXT /* Title of the listing */,
  "listing_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the listing */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of amenities */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the listing */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the listing is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the listing is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate */,
  "is_license_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the listing's license is verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_host_id FOREIGN KEY ("host_id") REFERENCES hosts ("host_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guest who wrote the review */,
  "review_scores_rating" REAL /* Overall rating score from the review */,
  "review_scores_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy rating based on the review */,
  "review_scores_cleanliness" REAL /* Cleanliness rating from the review */,
  "review_scores_checkin" REAL /* Check-in rating provided by the reviewer */,
  "review_scores_communication" REAL /* Communication rating given by the reviewer */,
  "review_scores_location" REAL /* Location rating from the review */,
  "review_scores_value" REAL /* Value rating from the review */,
  "review_comments" TEXT /* Text comments from the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES guests ("guest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing being booked */,
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guest making the booking */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date when the booking was made */,
  "check_in_date" TEXT /* Check-in date of the booking */,
  "check_out_date" TEXT /* Check-out date of the booking */,
  "number_of_guests" INTEGER /* Number of guests included in the booking */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the booking (e.g., confirmed, canceled) */,
  "payment_amount" TEXT /* Total payment amount for the booking */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used */,
  "is_cancelled" INTEGER /* Indicates if the booking was cancelled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_guest_id FOREIGN KEY ("guest_id") REFERENCES guests ("guest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guests" (
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guest */,
  "guest_name" TEXT /* Full name of the guest */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the guest */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the guest */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the guest has been verified */,
  "guest_since" TEXT /* Date when the guest joined the platform */,
  "guest_location" TEXT /* Location of the guest */,
  "guest_language" TEXT /* Languages spoken by the guest */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cancellation_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing associated with the policy */,
  "policy_type" TEXT /* Type of cancellation policy (e.g., flexible, moderate) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cancellation policy */,
  "refund_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of refund offered */,
  "cancellation_window" INTEGER /* Number of days before check-in when free cancellation is allowed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cancellation_policies_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instant_bookings" (
  "instant_booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instant booking setting */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing associated with the instant booking setting */,
  "is_instant_bookable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the listing is available for instant booking */,
  "instant_booking_terms" TEXT /* Terms and conditions for instant bookings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instant_booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instant_bookings_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pricing" (
  "pricing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pricing record */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing associated with the pricing details */,
  "base_price" TEXT /* Base price of the listing per night */,
  "security_deposit" TEXT /* Security deposit for the listing */,
  "cleaning_fee" TEXT /* Cleaning fee charged for the listing */,
  "weekly_discount" REAL /* Discount percentage for weekly bookings */,
  "monthly_discount" REAL /* Discount percentage for monthly bookings */,
  "seasonal_pricing" TEXT /* JSON string for seasonal pricing adjustments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pricing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id")
)
